title: WebhookEvent
description: Canonical envelope for all outbound webhook events delivered by the BANZA protocol to operator-configured HTTPS endpoints. Always signed with Banza-Signature header — see contracts/webhooks/signature.json.

id.description: Globally unique event ID. Use for deduplication — the same event may be delivered more than once under retry scenarios. Idempotent processing keyed on this field is required.

type.description: Event type identifier. See contracts/events/webhook-types.json for the canonical registry and payload schemas per type.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Shape varies by event type. See contracts/events/webhook-types.json for the schema per type. All monetary values use integer minor units (INV-LEDGER-003).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was created on the protocol side. Not the delivery time — a retried event retains its original created_at.
